config.script:
# Write your script here	
	"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat

		Purpose: Close Panel Event.
	"""
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightS')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'shiftPanel'
	ToDateTime = '2024-1-1 0:00:00'
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'AreaName':-1,'LineName':-1,'ShiftName':-1,'ShiftNumber':-1,'ToDateTime':ToDateTime}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/04/2024
		Purpose: Reset Shiftname, number and description to default value..
	"""
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftName").getChild("drpShiftName").props.value=-1
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftNumber").getChild("txt").props.value=0
	self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftDescription").getChild("txt").props.text=''

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/04/2024
		Purpose: Get shift number and description.
	"""
	if self.props.value > -1:
		description = ''
		shiftNumber=0
		#NamedQueryPath
		queryPath = 'Project_VECV/Shift/getShiftDescription'
		#NamedQuery Params
		queryParams = {"MST_Shift_Id": self.props.value}
		result = system.db.runNamedQuery(queryPath,queryParams)
		pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(result)
		optionList = []
		for data in pyData:
			description = data['Description']
			shiftNumber = data['ShiftNumber']
			break
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftDescription").getChild("txt").props.text = description
		self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftNumber").getChild("txt").props.value=shiftNumber

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/04/2024
		Purpose: Reset all parameters.
	"""
	# Write your script here	
	system.perspective.closeDock('rightS')
	system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
	headerLabel = "Add"
	messageType = 'shiftPanel'
	ToDateTime = '2024-1-1 0:00:00'
	payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'AreaName':-1,'LineName':-1,'ShiftName':-1,'ShiftNumber':-1,'ToDateTime':ToDateTime}		 			
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )

try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/04/2024
			Purpose: Save data to Table on Add/Edit Even.
		"""
		self.props.enabled=0
		Area_Id=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value
		Description=self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftDescription").getChild("txt").props.text
		ShiftNumber = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftNumber").getChild("txt").props.value
		MST_Line_Id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value
		MST_Shift_Id = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftName").getChild("drpShiftName").props.value
		ShiftEndTime = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftEndTime").getChild("FromDateTimeInput").props.value
		ShiftStartTime = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntShiftStartTime").getChild("ToDateTimeInput").props.value
		IsActive = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value
		system.perspective.print("ShiftStartTime "+ str(ShiftStartTime))
		system.perspective.print("ShiftEndTime "+ str(ShiftEndTime))
		if self.parent.parent.getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text == 'Add':
			CreatedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			Id=0
			TRN_Shift_Id = 0
			result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Shift.InsertUpdateShift.InsertUpdateShift(CreatedBy, IsActive ,MST_Line_Id, MST_Shift_Id, ShiftEndTime,  ShiftStartTime,  ShiftNumber,TRN_Shift_Id)
			if(result==0):
				message = "Shift Details Overlapped!"
				state = "warning"
			elif(result==1):
				message = "Shift details added successfully."
				state = "success"
				auditMsg=message + " AreaId=" + str(Area_Id) + ",LineId=" + str(MST_Line_Id) + ",ShiftNumber="+ str(ShiftNumber)
		else:
			ModifiedBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
			TRN_Shift_Id = self.session.custom.selectedTRNShiftID
			Id=TRN_Shift_Id
			result = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Shift.InsertUpdateShift.InsertUpdateShift(ModifiedBy, IsActive, MST_Line_Id, MST_Shift_Id, ShiftEndTime, ShiftStartTime, ShiftNumber, TRN_Shift_Id)
			if(result==0):
				message = "Shift Details Overlapped!"
				state = "warning"
			elif(result==1):
				message = "Shift details Updated successfully."
				state = "success"
				auditMsg=message
#		if result==1:
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		
		#addToAuditLogStrat
		system.perspective.print(auditMsg)
		category='Adminstration'
		subCategory='Shift Configuration'
		#Audit Log
		if(Id!=0):
			prevDesc=self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload
			#curDesc={"linetypecode":LineTypeCode, "mode":mode, "isActive":isActive, "Code":bomId }
			curDesc = {
				"ShiftNumber":ShiftNumber,
				"LineName":MST_Line_Id,
				"ShiftName":MST_Shift_Id,
				"EndTime":ShiftEndTime,
				"StartTime":ShiftStartTime ,
				"IsActive":IsActive,
				"AreaName":Area_Id,
				"Description":Description
			}
			import json
			curDesc_json = json.dumps(load)
			curDesc=curDesc_json
			system.perspective.print(prevDesc)
			system.perspective.print(curDesc)
			description=str(auditMsg)+"Where ID="+str(Id)+" With Previous Data->"+str(prevDesc)+" and Updated Data->"+str(curDesc)
		else:
			description=str(auditMsg)
		createdBy=self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddAuditLogs(category, subCategory, description, createdBy)
		#addAuditLogEnd
		
	except:
		screenName ='ShiftPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/ShiftPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed  ->cntSave/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print("errorFunction: "+str(errorFunction)+" description: "+str(description)+" lineno: "+str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	load=payload.copy()
	#system.perspective.print("Printing payload of msg handler----------->")
	#system.perspective.print(payload)
	load.pop('headerLabel')
	load.pop('Action')
	#system.perspective.print("msg handler1----------->")
	import json
	load_json = json.dumps(load)
	self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload=load_json
	#system.perspective.print("msg handler2----------->")
	#system.perspective.print("payload msghandler3------------->")
	#system.perspective.print(self.view.getChild("root").custom.payload)

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 04/09/2024
		Purpose: Check Special character in text. 
	"""
	import re
	 
	def contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    # Define a regex pattern for special characters
	    pattern = r'[^a-zA-Z0-9 -_]'
	    
	    # Search for special characters
	    if re.search(pattern, input_string):
	        return True
	    else:
	        return False
	 
	# Calling Special Character Check Function
	input_string = self.props.text
	if contains_special_characters(input_string):
	    self.props.text = str(self.props.text)[:-1]

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/04/2024
			Purpose: Passing data to Panel for Add/Edit.
		"""
		system.perspective.print("Payload%s"%payload)
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntHeader").getChild("lblHeader").props.text = payload['headerLabel']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntAreaName").getChild("drpAreaName").props.value = payload['AreaName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntLineName").getChild("drpLineName").props.value = payload['LineName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntShiftName").getChild("drpShiftName").props.value = payload['ShiftName']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntShiftNumber").getChild("txt").props.value = payload['ShiftNumber']
		if payload['headerLabel'] == 'Add':
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntShiftStartTime").getChild("ToDateTimeInput").props.value = payload['StartTime']
		else:
			#parsing datetime format for start and end time
			dt = str(payload['StartTime'])
			year = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[0])
			month = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[1])
			date = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[2])
			newDate = system.date.getDate(int(year), month, date)
			
			hours = int(dt.split(" ")[1].split(":")[0])
			mins = int(dt.split(" ")[1].split(":")[1])
			
			StartTime = system.date.setTime(newDate, hours, mins, 0)
			system.perspective.print("StartTime%s"%StartTime)
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntShiftStartTime").getChild("ToDateTimeInput").props.value = StartTime
			
			dt = str(payload['EndTime'])
			month = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[1])
			date = int(dt.split(" ")[0].split("-")[2])
			
			newDate = system.date.getDate(int(2024), month, date)
			
			hours = int(dt.split(" ")[1].split(":")[0])
			mins = int(dt.split(" ")[1].split(":")[1])
			
			EndTime = system.date.setTime(newDate, hours, mins, 0)
			system.perspective.print("EndTime%s"%EndTime)
			self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntShiftEndTime").getChild("FromDateTimeInput").props.value = EndTime
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntIsActive").getChild("drpIsActive").props.value = payload['IsActive']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntShiftDescription").getChild("txt").props.text = payload['Description']
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntSave").getChild("btn_Save").props.text = payload['Action']
		system.perspective.print("ShiftPanel Script Ended.")
	except:
		screenName ='ShiftPanel'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Pannel/ShiftPanel')  
		errorFunction = str('messageHandler/shiftPanel')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
